arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-1,-1,1,1) sprite_index=sScaledCollision xCheck=x image_angle=270 x+=15 y+=16 image_xscale=-16
//Enemy base statistics atkPower=12 bCanTakeDamage=false bShowHealthBar=false
xSPlace=x-15 extendDist=0 seekSpeed=4 //how fast it comes out seekTime=0 seekMax=12 //how long it will extend waitTime=45 //how long it waits till it retracts and can go back out bTargetFound=false detectDistX=128 detectDistY=160
alarm[0]=1
